/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/gguf-hash.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/xxhash.dir/deps/xxhash/xxhash.c.o CMakeFiles/sha1.dir/deps/sha1/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/sha256.dir/deps/sha256/sha256.c.o -o ../../bin/llama-gguf-hash  -Wl,-rpath,/home/randy/llama.cpp/bin: ../../bin/libggml.so ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../../bin/libggml-cuda.so ../../bin/libggml-base.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so
